title: Dense Herbal Russian Beef Pilaf
description: A hearty, one-pot Russian dish featuring beef, jam, and a blend of herbs, cooked to perfection in a paella pan. This halal-friendly recipe is perfect for a satisfying dinner.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan over medium-high heat.
Add the beef strips and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Stir in the thyme and rosemary, and cook for 1 minute.
Add the rice and cook for 1-2 minutes, until lightly toasted.
Add the beef broth, jam, salt, and black pepper, and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes, until the rice is tender and the liquid is absorbed.
Remove from heat and let steam, covered, for 5 minutes.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and serve hot.
